title: Tools and Workflows
description: The actual toolset: Claude Code, GitHub Actions, cPanel, VS Code, and the workflows that make solo development of multiple properties viable.
about: Running 8+ properties solo requires ruthless toolchain efficiency. This channel documents the actual tools, keyboard shortcuts, deployment pipelines, and AI-assisted workflows that make this scale possible.
